official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the block_event packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, and writing the block_event body without initialized world or block entity state.
Official binary source for the position, event byte, event data byte, and block registry id body shape.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound block_event frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses the official public constructor and STREAM_CODEC with a context-free BlockPos value, built-in Blocks.NOTE_BLOCK, and byte-sized event type/data values. It requires bootstrapped built-in registries for the registry codec but no initialized Level, BlockEntity, or game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound block_event packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official BlockPos, built-in note_block, event type, and event data fixture only; do not infer block event semantics, note block behavior, world/chunk state, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
